functions.name: GENERATE_POSTGRES_ACCESS_TOKEN_FOR_USER
functions.category: Generates a short-lived access token for a Snowflake user to use as a password when logging into a Snowflake Postgres instance that has the AUTHENTICATION_AUTHORITY attribute set to POSTGRES_OR_SNOWFLAKE.
